message:
Fix from_mysql operator caching_sha2_password and query priority

This fixes three issues in the from_mysql operator:

1. Fix caching_sha2_password authentication: swap 0x03/0x04 status byte
   handling. 0x03 indicates fast auth success (cached password), while 0x04
   requires sending the full password as null-terminated cleartext.

2. Fix show/table argument priority so show="columns" works with a table
   name. Reorder priority: show > sql > table.

3. Remove debug logging (TENZIR_ERROR calls) and unused logger include that
   were left from development.

Additionally, refactor async I/O to use a dedicated ScopedEventBaseThread
instead of the global IO executor, wrapping all Transport operations in
scheduleOn() to ensure AsyncSocket callbacks fire on the correct thread.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
